final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration featuring traditional 中国少数民族服饰 as a full annotated reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours; must read as authoritative, restrained, collectible reference art, not a poster or commercial illustration
Composition: must follow this fixed layout — top: 中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语; left: structural exploded-view zone with 中文引线标注 of key components and close-up detail insets; upper-right: materials / craftsmanship / texture zone with real-texture swatches and captions; mid-right: 纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意 zone with primary color palette, pattern samples, and cultural annotations; bottom: dressing-sequence / construction flow diagram + 核心特征总结
Subject: must include a full-body standing figure (realistic, non-stylized) as the central subject wearing a complete 中国少数民族服饰 ensemble — minority group, garment system, era style, and key components to be determined by the model for maximum representational richness; all structural parts, layering, and accessories must be anatomically and historically accurate
Scene/backdrop: must use a paper-toned background — 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 — with subtle paper or silk texture; no environmental scene, no decorative background elements
Lighting/mood: needs a flat, even, archival-illustration atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours; must support legibility of annotation lines and texture swatches
Color palette: needs a muted, scholarly direction anchored by the garment's authentic colors — exact palette and ratios are yours; overall tone must feel high-end, restrained, and museum-grade
Materials/textures: needs authentic textile surface representation — exact rendering of silk sheen, embroidery relief, woven pattern grain, and dye variation is yours; texture swatches in the upper-right zone must read as real material samples
Text (verbatim): must include all of the following in 简体中文, clearly legible, well-spaced, no romanization, no garbled characters:
  - 中文主标题（少数民族名 + 服饰名）
  - 副标题（朝代 / 地域 / 场合）
  - 导语（2–3句文博风格简介）
  - 引线标注（每个关键部件名称 + 简短说明）
  - 材质说明（每块纹理小样旁附材质名 + 工艺描述）
  - 纹样寓意（每个纹样样本旁附名称 + 文化含义）
  - 色彩含义（主色板每色附色名 + 象征说明）
  - 底部流程图标签（穿着顺序步骤 + 核心特征总结条目）
Constraints: must preserve accurate garment structure, component hierarchy, and cultural authenticity; all annotation lines must connect clearly to the correct garment part; layout zones must be visually distinct and structurally organized; all text must be 简体中文 only
Avoid: poster aesthetic, 影楼 / 写真 feel, e-commerce product-page feel, anime or 动漫 stylization, cosplay feel, tangled or misconnected annotation lines, structurally incorrect garment assembly, blurry or illegible text, fake or decorative-only textures, over-ornamentation
